Lexicon registry which you can use to find a word in your collection as well as all texts and elements that use this word. In the picture, the registry keeps 955,665 words. On the left, in the top panel, an exemplary text from the collection containing the word ''abbasid''. In the panel below it, the word's Arabic phonetic transcription (showcasing SuperMemo's support for Unicode). In the bottom panel, the list of text registry members with the word. Double-clicking the selected member in the list will open its corresponding entry in the text registry.
